rune_phrase_known.description: The player has decoded the courier passphrase from the cairn runes.

vault_forced.description: The player opened the cache by brute force rather than by phrase.

cairn_marked.description: The player marked the cairn for a later return.

cairn_force_attempts.description: Number of brute-force attempts made against the cairn latch.

archivist_thread.description: Tracks whether the Daggerford archivist thread is only discovered or fully activated.
